name: Rattan Battery/Solar LED Outdoor Medium Lantern Heathered Green - Threshold™
description:
Bring decorative lighting to your patio, deck or garden with this Rattan Battery/Solar LED Outdoor Medium Lantern from Threshold™. This water-resistant lantern with an LED bulb is designed in a tapered silhouette with heathered rattan weaving, set atop a light brown round pedestal base. Powered by both battery and solar energy, it offers flexible lighting to your outdoor space. The touch-activated sensor provides convenient on/off control, while the top handle makes it easy to move.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
